title: LEGO NINJAGO Kai’s Mech Storm Rider - Ninja Toy with a Flying Motorbike, Action Figure & 3 Minifigures - Birthday Gift Idea for 7 Plus Year Old Boys, Girls and Dragons Rising Fans 71830
features: Ninja toy for kids – 7+ year old boys and girls can play out battles from season 3 of the NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV show with Kai’s Mech Storm Rider
Combo ninja vehicle – The large vehicle in this LEGO NINJAGO set can be separated into 2 smaller vehicles: Kai’s mech and Nya’s flying motorcycle
Packed with cool features – Kai’s mech toy has a posable head, arms and legs, plus a cockpit with space for a minifigure, and a storm blade accessory
Nya’s 'flying' motorbike toy has a minifigure cockpit, movable wings and 2 spring-loaded shooters for kids to play out epic battles with the ninja
3 LEGO NINJAGO minifigures – The set comes with NINJAGO characters Kai, Nya and a Dragonian Warrior, all with cool toy weapon accessories
Birthday gift for kids – This action toy makes a fun birthday gift idea for 7+ year old boys, girls and kids who love teaming up with their favourite ninja heroes
Bigger ninja adventures – Look out for more LEGO NINJAGO building toys (sets sold separately) to play out action with Kai’s Mech Storm Rider
description: From the manufacturer LEGO NINJAGO combo vehicle toy Combo ninja toy with 3 minifigures lets kids enjoy action play with a posable mech figure and flying motorcycle. Fun build-and-play experience for ninja fans Kids assemble Kai’s Mech Storm Rider and recreate action from season 3 of the NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV show. LEGO NINJAGO Kai’s Mech Storm Rider Combo ninja vehicle Storm rider separates into a mech and a flying motorcycle. Armed for battle Flying motorbike toy has 2 spring-loaded shooters. 3 NINJAGO minifigures Playset includes Kai, Nya and a Dragonian Warrior. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track their progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. More LEGO NINJAGO sets to collect Other LEGO NINJAGO sets (sold separately) let kids enjoy even bigger ninja adventures with their heroes.
